notableEvents.label: Braden Shewmake GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braden Shewmake grounds into a double play, second baseman Justin Foscue to shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Cam Smith out at 2nd. Braden Shewmake out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: César Salazar plunked
notableEvents.detail: César Salazar hit by pitch. Cam Smith scores. Braden Shewmake to 3rd. Brice Matthews to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Christian Walker. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Justin Foscue out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Christian Walker. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Justin Foscue out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
